---
title: "Mary Alethea Coleridge"
---

## Mary Alethea Coleridge

**Dates:** (1851-2 April 1940)

**Maiden name:** (Mackarness)

### Description

eldest daughter of Alethea Mackarness.

### Biography

She married (3 Aug 1876) her first cousin the Hon. Bernard John Seymour Coleridge. [PB 1889, 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th 1877 
- Letter from July 3d [1876]
- Letter from June 1st 1876
- Letter from Oct 22d [1851[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
